text:
これが黒い粒子……
何でしょう、これ……
禍々しいとでもいうんでしょうか。

気象の変化と
直接関係があるかはわかりませんが
とにかく解析に回してみます。

これで依頼内容は完了です。
どうもありがとうござい

So THESE are black particles. Fascinating.
What ARE they? Am I supposed to
feel... menaced?

It's too early to say if they're directly
connected to the climatic changes of late, but
I'll analyze them and see what I come up with.

That marks your Order as complete.
Thank you very much!
